title: Public School Nutrition Modernization Act
bill_text: A BILL To improve nutritional standards and grant support for K-12 school meals. SEC. 1 establishes updated sodium and sugar limits. SEC. 2 authorizes grants for kitchen modernization and nutrition education.

expected_effects: Healthier school meals and lower long-term student health risk
Short-term compliance costs for districts and suppliers
Potential federal grant relief for equipment upgrades

title: Grid Resilience and Storage Deployment Act
bill_text: A BILL To improve electric grid reliability through transmission upgrades and utility-scale battery storage grants. The Secretary of Energy shall administer competitive grants for state and regional projects.

expected_effects: Higher grid reliability and fewer outage events
Upfront infrastructure spending with possible rate impacts
Increased demand for domestic storage and transmission contractors

title: Community Health Clinic Expansion Act
bill_text: A BILL To provide funding to expand community health centers in medically underserved areas and increase telehealth reimbursement for primary care services.

expected_effects: Improved access to primary care and preventive services
Lower travel burden for rural and low-income patients
Greater provider capacity through telehealth reimbursement

title: Federal Procurement Transparency Act
bill_text: A BILL To require publication of federal procurement contracts, subcontracting reports, and performance metrics in a centralized public dashboard.

expected_effects: Improved public visibility into federal spending
Additional reporting/compliance obligations for agencies and vendors
Faster detection of waste, fraud, and underperforming contracts

title: Watershed Restoration and Flood Mitigation Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund watershed restoration, wetland rehabilitation, and local flood mitigation projects through EPA and Army Corps coordination.

expected_effects: Reduced flood risk over medium to long term
Increased project planning and permitting workload for local governments
Short-term job creation in restoration and civil works

title: Community Broadband Access Act
bill_text: A BILL To expand affordable broadband access in rural and low-income communities.

expected_effects: Better internet access for remote work, school, and telehealth
Upfront buildout costs for providers
Potential long-term productivity gains in underserved areas

title: Food Assistance Benefits Improvement Act
bill_text: A BILL To raise benefit adequacy and simplify enrollment for nutrition assistance programs.

expected_effects: Reduced food insecurity for participating households
More administrative work for agencies during rollout
Higher grocery spending in participating communities

title: Public Housing Repair Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund capital repairs and safety upgrades in public housing developments.

expected_effects: Improved living conditions and safety in aging housing stock
Temporary disruption during repairs
Added construction demand and local employment

title: Renewable Grid Expansion Act
bill_text: A BILL To support transmission upgrades and utility-scale renewable integration.

expected_effects: Faster connection of clean energy projects to the grid
Upfront infrastructure spending that may affect rates
Better long-term grid flexibility and reliability

title: Maternal Health Outcomes Act
bill_text: A BILL To expand maternal health services, postpartum care, and rural obstetric support.

expected_effects: Improved maternal and infant health outcomes
More staffing and service coverage in underserved areas
Higher near-term public spending with potential downstream savings
